chapter_title.en: The Severity of a Believer’s Afflictions

text: : قال رسول الله (ص) عجَباً للمؤمنِ، إنّ الله لا يقضي قضاءً إلاّ كان خيراً له، فإن ابتُليَ صبرَ، وإن أُعطيَ شَكر.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 46. It has been reported that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said that the Prophet (a.s) said: How wonderful the believer is! Whatever Allah decrees is always good for him. When he is afflicted, he bears patience and when he is bestowed, he gives thanks.
